* {{ill|Jōgan (Japan)|ja|貞観|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 8 (Intercalary March) (Julian {{ill|866|ja|866th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 28|ja|4月28日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Ōtenmon Incident|ja|応天門の変|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} : The {{ill|Ōtenmon Gate|ja|応天門|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} is set ablaze. {{ill|Ban no Yoshio|ja|伴善男|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , a descendant of the {{ill|Ōtomo clan|ja|大伴氏|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , is exiled as the arsonist, marking the decline of the clan’s political influence.
* {{ill|Eiwa (Japan)|ja|永和|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 4 / {{ill|Tenju (Japan)|ja|天授 (日本)|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 4 (Julian {{ill|1378|ja|1378th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 7|ja|4月7日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshimitsu|ja|足利義満|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} moves the {{ill|Muromachi shogunate|ja|Ashikaga Shogunate|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} to the newly constructed {{ill|Muromachi Palace|ja|室町殿|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (Hana no Gosho) in Kyoto.
* {{ill|Daoguang Emperor|ja|道光|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 19 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1839|ja|1839th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 23|ja|4月23日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – Qing officials arrive in {{ill|Guangdong|ja|広東|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} to enforce a crackdown on {{ill|opium|ja|阿片|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , leading to large-scale confiscation and destruction.
* {{ill|Meiji (era)|ja|明治|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 2 (Gregorian {{ill|1869|ja|1869th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 21|ja|4月21日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The {{ill|Tokyo City|ja|東京市|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} abolishes the {{ill|machinushi|ja|町名主|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} system, dismissing 238 town chiefs.
* Meiji 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1872|ja|1872nd year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 17|ja|4月17日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The {{ill|Ministry of Education (Japan)|ja|文部省|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} establishes a museum department (now the {{ill|Tokyo National Museum|ja|東京国立博物館|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) and hosts the first {{ill|exposition|ja|博覧会|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} at {{ill|Yushima Seidō|ja|湯島聖堂|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 's Taiseiden ({{ill|Yushima Seidō Exposition|ja|湯島聖堂博覧会|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Births ==
* {{ill|Chōshō (era)|ja|長承|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 3 (Julian {{ill|1134|ja|1134th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 6|ja|4月6日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Yasuda Yoshisada|ja|安田義定|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , Japanese {{ill|samurai|ja|武将|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1194|ja|1194th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Tenbun (era)|ja|天文|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 5 (Julian {{ill|1536|ja|1536th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|March 31|ja|3月31日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshiteru|ja|足利義輝|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , 13th {{ill|Shogun|ja|征夷大将軍|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} of the {{ill|Muromachi shogunate|ja|Ashikaga Shogunate|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1565|ja|1565th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Bunsei (era)|ja|文政|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1822|ja|1822nd year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|May 11|ja|5月11日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Kurikoma Jōun|ja|栗本鋤雲|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|bakufu|ja|幕臣|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} official and {{ill|journalist|ja|ジャーナリスト|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1897|ja|1897th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Kaei (era)|ja|嘉永|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 1 (Gregorian {{ill|1848|ja|1848th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 13|ja|4月13日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Asano Sōichirō|ja|浅野総一郎|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , entrepreneur and founder of the {{ill|Asano zaibatsu|ja|浅野財閥|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1930|ja|1930th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Keiō (era)|ja|慶応|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 2 (Gregorian {{ill|1866|ja|1866th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 24|ja|4月24日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Ishii Kikujirō|ja|石井菊次郎|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , Japanese {{ill|diplomat|ja|外交官|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1945|ja|1945th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Meiji (era)|ja|明治|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 4 (Gregorian {{ill|1871|ja|1871st year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 29|ja|4月29日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Yoshioka Yayoi|ja|吉岡弥生|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , physician and founder of {{ill|Tokyo Women's Medical University|ja|東京女子医科大学|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1959|ja|1959th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Deaths ==
* Emperor Monmu 4 (Julian {{ill|700|ja|700th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 3|ja|4月3日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Dōshō|ja|道昭|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , Buddhist monk.
* {{ill|Enryaku (era)|ja|延暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 9 (Intercalary March) (Julian {{ill|790|ja|790th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 28|ja|4月28日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Otomuro|ja|藤原乙牟漏|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , Empress of {{ill|Emperor Kanmu|ja|桓武天皇|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|760|ja|760th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Kenkyū (era)|ja|建久|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 2 (Julian {{ill|1191|ja|1191st year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 5|ja|4月5日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Nagakata|ja|藤原長方|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , senior court official and author of *An'nagon Nagakata Collection* and *Zenchūki* (* {{ill|1139|ja|1139th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Tenbun (era)|ja|天文|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 15 (Julian {{ill|1544|ja|1544th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 10|ja|4月10日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Ryūzōji Iekane|ja|龍造寺家兼|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , feudal lord of {{ill|Kyushu|ja|九州|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1454|ja|1454th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).

[[Category:Pages to sort]] [[Category:qq]][[de:March 10 (Lunisolar)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]]{{DEFAULTSORT:March 10 (Lunisolar)}}[[Category:qq]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 10 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[Category:Pages to sort]] [[Category:qq]][[de:March 10 (Lunisolar)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]]{{DEFAULTSORT:March 10 (Lunisolar)}}[[Category:qq]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 10 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[Category:Pages to sort]] [[Category:qq]][[de:March 10 (Lunisolar)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]]{{DEFAULTSORT:March 10 (Lunisolar)}}[[Category:qq]] [[zh-yue:三月初十]] {{Lunisolar March}} '''March 10''' is the 10th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Events ==
* {{ill|Emperor Monmu|ja|文武天皇|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 4 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|700|ja|700th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 3|ja|4月3日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – Buddhist monk {{ill|Dōshō|ja|道昭|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} is cremated, marking the first recorded cremation in Japan.
* {{ill|Wadō (era)|ja|和銅|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 3 (Julian {{ill|710|ja|710th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 13|ja|4月13日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Empress Genmei|ja|Emperor Genmei|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} relocates the capital from {{ill|Fujiwara-kyō|ja|藤原京|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} to {{ill|Heijō-kyō|ja|Heijō-kyō|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} .
* {{ill|Jōgan (Japan)|ja|貞観|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 8 (Intercalary March) (Julian {{ill|866|ja|866th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 28|ja|4月28日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Ōtenmon Incident|ja|応天門の変|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} : The {{ill|Ōtenmon Gate|ja|応天門|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} is set ablaze. {{ill|Ban no Yoshio|ja|伴善男|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , a descendant of the {{ill|Ōtomo clan|ja|大伴氏|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , is exiled as the arsonist, marking the decline of the clan’s political influence.
* {{ill|Eiwa (Japan)|ja|永和|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 4 / {{ill|Tenju (Japan)|ja|天授 (日本)|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 4 (Julian {{ill|1378|ja|1378th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 7|ja|4月7日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshimitsu|ja|足利義満|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} moves the {{ill|Muromachi shogunate|ja|Ashikaga Shogunate|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} to the newly constructed {{ill|Muromachi Palace|ja|室町殿|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (Hana no Gosho) in Kyoto.
* {{ill|Daoguang Emperor|ja|道光|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 19 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1839|ja|1839th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 23|ja|4月23日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – Qing officials arrive in {{ill|Guangdong|ja|広東|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} to enforce a crackdown on {{ill|opium|ja|阿片|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , leading to large-scale confiscation and destruction.
* {{ill|Meiji (era)|ja|明治|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 2 (Gregorian {{ill|1869|ja|1869th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 21|ja|4月21日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The {{ill|Tokyo City|ja|東京市|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} abolishes the {{ill|machinushi|ja|町名主|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} system, dismissing 238 town chiefs.
* Meiji 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1872|ja|1872nd year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 17|ja|4月17日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The {{ill|Ministry of Education (Japan)|ja|文部省|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} establishes a museum department (now the {{ill|Tokyo National Museum|ja|東京国立博物館|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) and hosts the first {{ill|exposition|ja|博覧会|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} at {{ill|Yushima Seidō|ja|湯島聖堂|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 's Taiseiden ({{ill|Yushima Seidō Exposition|ja|湯島聖堂博覧会|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).

* {{ill|Kaei (era)|ja|嘉永|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 1 (Gregorian {{ill|1848|ja|1848th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 13|ja|4月13日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Asano Sōichirō|ja|浅野総一郎|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , entrepreneur and founder of the {{ill|Asano zaibatsu|ja|浅野財閥|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1930|ja|1930th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Keiō (era)|ja|慶応|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 2 (Gregorian {{ill|1866|ja|1866th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 24|ja|4月24日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Ishii Kikujirō|ja|石井菊次郎|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , Japanese {{ill|diplomat|ja|外交官|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1945|ja|1945th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Meiji (era)|ja|明治|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 4 (Gregorian {{ill|1871|ja|1871st year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 29|ja|4月29日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Yoshioka Yayoi|ja|吉岡弥生|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , physician and founder of {{ill|Tokyo Women's Medical University|ja|東京女子医科大学|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1959|ja|1959th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).

{{DEFAULTSORT:March 10 (Lunisolar)}}

{{Lunisolar March}} '''March 10''' is the 10th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} .

[[de:March 10 (Lunisolar)]] [[sn:March 10 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 10일]] [[ja:3月10日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:三月初十]] [[en:draft:March 10 (Lunisolar)]] [[ja:和銅3rd year の出来事]] [[sn:3月10日 (旧暦)]] [[en:3月10日 (旧暦)]] [[sn:arch 10 (Lunisolar)]] [[ar:March 10 (Lunisolar)]]
{{DEFAULTSORT:March 10 (Lunisolar)}}

{{Lunisolar March}} '''March 10''' is the 10th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Events ==
* {{ill|Emperor Monmu|ja|文武天皇|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 4 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|700|ja|700th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 3|ja|4月3日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – Buddhist monk {{ill|Dōshō|ja|道昭|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} is cremated, marking the first recorded cremation in Japan.
* {{ill|Wadō (era)|ja|和銅|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 3 (Julian {{ill|710|ja|710th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 13|ja|4月13日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Empress Genmei|ja|Emperor Genmei|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} relocates the capital from {{ill|Fujiwara-kyō|ja|藤原京|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} to {{ill|Heijō-kyō|ja|Heijō-kyō|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} .
* {{ill|Jōgan (Japan)|ja|貞観|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 8 (Intercalary March) (Julian {{ill|866|ja|866th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 28|ja|4月28日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Ōtenmon Incident|ja|応天門の変|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} : The {{ill|Ōtenmon Gate|ja|応天門|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} is set ablaze. {{ill|Ban no Yoshio|ja|伴善男|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , a descendant of the {{ill|Ōtomo clan|ja|大伴氏|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , is exiled as the arsonist, marking the decline of the clan’s political influence.
* {{ill|Eiwa (Japan)|ja|永和|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 4 / {{ill|Tenju (Japan)|ja|天授 (日本)|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 4 (Julian {{ill|1378|ja|1378th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 7|ja|4月7日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshimitsu|ja|足利義満|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} moves the {{ill|Muromachi shogunate|ja|Ashikaga Shogunate|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} to the newly constructed {{ill|Muromachi Palace|ja|室町殿|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (Hana no Gosho) in Kyoto.
* {{ill|Daoguang Emperor|ja|道光|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 19 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1839|ja|1839th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 23|ja|4月23日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – Qing officials arrive in {{ill|Guangdong|ja|広東|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} to enforce a crackdown on {{ill|opium|ja|阿片|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , leading to large-scale confiscation and destruction.
* {{ill|Meiji (era)|ja|明治|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 2 (Gregorian {{ill|1869|ja|1869th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 21|ja|4月21日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The {{ill|Tokyo City|ja|東京市|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} abolishes the {{ill|machinushi|ja|町名主|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} system, dismissing 238 town chiefs.
* Meiji 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1872|ja|1872nd year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 17|ja|4月17日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The {{ill|Ministry of Education (Japan)|ja|文部省|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} establishes a museum department (now the {{ill|Tokyo National Museum|ja|東京国立博物館|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) and hosts the first {{ill|exposition|ja|博覧会|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} at {{ill|Yushima Seidō|ja|湯島聖堂|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 's Taiseiden ({{ill|Yushima Seidō Exposition|ja|湯島聖堂博覧会|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Births ==
* {{ill|Chōshō (era)|ja|長承|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 3 (Julian {{ill|1134|ja|1134th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 6|ja|4月6日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Yasuda Yoshisada|ja|安田義定|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , Japanese {{ill|samurai|ja|武将|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1194|ja|1194th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Tenbun (era)|ja|天文|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 5 (Julian {{ill|1536|ja|1536th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|March 31|ja|3月31日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshiteru|ja|足利義輝|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , 13th {{ill|Shogun|ja|征夷大将軍|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} of the {{ill|Muromachi shogunate|ja|Ashikaga Shogunate|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1565|ja|1565th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Bunsei (era)|ja|文政|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1822|ja|1822nd year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|May 11|ja|5月11日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Kurikoma Jōun|ja|栗本鋤雲|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|bakufu|ja|幕臣|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} official and {{ill|journalist|ja|ジャーナリスト|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1897|ja|1897th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Kaei (era)|ja|嘉永|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 1 (Gregorian {{ill|1848|ja|1848th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 13|ja|4月13日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Asano Sōichirō|ja|浅野総一郎|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , entrepreneur and founder of the {{ill|Asano zaibatsu|ja|浅野財閥|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1930|ja|1930th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Keiō (era)|ja|慶応|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 2 (Gregorian {{ill|1866|ja|1866th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 24|ja|4月24日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Ishii Kikujirō|ja|石井菊次郎|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , Japanese {{ill|diplomat|ja|外交官|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1945|ja|1945th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Meiji (era)|ja|明治|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 4 (Gregorian {{ill|1871|ja|1871st year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 29|ja|4月29日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Yoshioka Yayoi|ja|吉岡弥生|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , physician and founder of {{ill|Tokyo Women's Medical University|ja|東京女子医科大学|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1959|ja|1959th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Deaths ==
* Emperor Monmu 4 (Julian {{ill|700|ja|700th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 3|ja|4月3日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Dōshō|ja|道昭|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , Buddhist monk.
* {{ill|Enryaku (era)|ja|延暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 9 (Intercalary March) (Julian {{ill|790|ja|790th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 28|ja|4月28日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Otomuro|ja|藤原乙牟漏|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , Empress of {{ill|Emperor Kanmu|ja|桓武天皇|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|760|ja|760th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Kenkyū (era)|ja|建久|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 2 (Julian {{ill|1191|ja|1191st year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 5|ja|4月5日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Nagakata|ja|藤原長方|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , senior court official and author of *An'nagon Nagakata Collection* and *Zenchūki* (* {{ill|1139|ja|1139th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Tenbun (era)|ja|天文|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 15 (Julian {{ill|1544|ja|1544th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 10|ja|4月10日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Ryūzōji Iekane|ja|龍造寺家兼|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , feudal lord of {{ill|Kyushu|ja|九州|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1454|ja|1454th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Kan'ei (era)|ja|寛永|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 14 (Gregorian {{ill|1637|ja|1637th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 5|ja|4月5日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Honda Masazumi|ja|本多正純|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , early Edo-period {{ill|daimyō|ja|大名|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1565|ja|1565th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).

* {{ill|Kenkyū (era)|ja|建久|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 2 (Julian {{ill|1191|ja|1191st year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 5|ja|4月5日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Nagakata|ja|藤原長方|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , senior court official and author of *An'nagon Nagakata Collection* and *Zenchūki* (* {{ill|1139|ja|1139th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Tenbun (era)|ja|天文|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 15 (Julian {{ill|1544|ja|1544th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 10|ja|4月10日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Ryūzōji Iekane|ja|龍造寺家兼|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , feudal lord of {{ill|Kyushu|ja|九州|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1454|ja|1454th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).

[[de:March 10 (Lunisolar)]] [[sn:March 10 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 10일]] [[ja:3月10日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:三月初十]] [[en:draft:March 10 (Lunisolar)]] [[ja:和銅3rd year の出来事]] [[sn:3月10日 (旧暦)]] [[en:3月10日 (旧暦)]] [[sn:arch 10 (Lunisolar)]] [[ar:March 10 (Lunisolar)]]
{{DEFAULTSORT:March 10 (Lunisolar)}}

{{Lunisolar March}} '''March 10''' is the 10th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Events ==
* {{ill|Emperor Monmu|ja|文武天皇|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 4 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|700|ja|700th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 3|ja|4月3日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – Buddhist monk {{ill|Dōshō|ja|道昭|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} is cremated, marking the first recorded cremation in Japan.
* {{ill|Wadō (era)|ja|和銅|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 3 (Julian {{ill|710|ja|710th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 13|ja|4月13日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Empress Genmei|ja|Emperor Genmei|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} relocates the capital from {{ill|Fujiwara-kyō|ja|藤原京|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} to {{ill|Heijō-kyō|ja|Heijō-kyō|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} .
* {{ill|Jōgan (Japan)|ja|貞観|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 8 (Intercalary March) (Julian {{ill|866|ja|866th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 28|ja|4月28日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Ōtenmon Incident|ja|応天門の変|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} : The {{ill|Ōtenmon Gate|ja|応天門|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} is set ablaze. {{ill|Ban no Yoshio|ja|伴善男|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , a descendant of the {{ill|Ōtomo clan|ja|大伴氏|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , is exiled as the arsonist, marking the decline of the clan’s political influence.
* {{ill|Eiwa (Japan)|ja|永和|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 4 / {{ill|Tenju (Japan)|ja|天授 (日本)|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 4 (Julian {{ill|1378|ja|1378th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 7|ja|4月7日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshimitsu|ja|足利義満|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} moves the {{ill|Muromachi shogunate|ja|Ashikaga Shogunate|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} to the newly constructed {{ill|Muromachi Palace|ja|室町殿|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (Hana no Gosho) in Kyoto.
* {{ill|Daoguang Emperor|ja|道光|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 19 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1839|ja|1839th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 23|ja|4月23日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – Qing officials arrive in {{ill|Guangdong|ja|広東|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} to enforce a crackdown on {{ill|opium|ja|阿片|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , leading to large-scale confiscation and destruction.
* {{ill|Meiji (era)|ja|明治|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 2 (Gregorian {{ill|1869|ja|1869th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 21|ja|4月21日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The {{ill|Tokyo City|ja|東京市|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} abolishes the {{ill|machinushi|ja|町名主|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} system, dismissing 238 town chiefs.
* Meiji 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1872|ja|1872nd year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 17|ja|4月17日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The {{ill|Ministry of Education (Japan)|ja|文部省|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} establishes a museum department (now the {{ill|Tokyo National Museum|ja|東京国立博物館|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) and hosts the first {{ill|exposition|ja|博覧会|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} at {{ill|Yushima Seidō|ja|湯島聖堂|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 's Taiseiden ({{ill|Yushima Seidō Exposition|ja|湯島聖堂博覧会|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Births ==
* {{ill|Chōshō (era)|ja|長承|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 3 (Julian {{ill|1134|ja|1134th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 6|ja|4月6日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Yasuda Yoshisada|ja|安田義定|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , Japanese {{ill|samurai|ja|武将|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1194|ja|1194th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Tenbun (era)|ja|天文|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 5 (Julian {{ill|1536|ja|1536th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|March 31|ja|3月31日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshiteru|ja|足利義輝|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , 13th {{ill|Shogun|ja|征夷大将軍|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} of the {{ill|Muromachi shogunate|ja|Ashikaga Shogunate|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1565|ja|1565th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Bunsei (era)|ja|文政|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1822|ja|1822nd year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|May 11|ja|5月11日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Kurikoma Jōun|ja|栗本鋤雲|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|bakufu|ja|幕臣|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} official and {{ill|journalist|ja|ジャーナリスト|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1897|ja|1897th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Kaei (era)|ja|嘉永|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 1 (Gregorian {{ill|1848|ja|1848th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 13|ja|4月13日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Asano Sōichirō|ja|浅野総一郎|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , entrepreneur and founder of the {{ill|Asano zaibatsu|ja|浅野財閥|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1930|ja|1930th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Keiō (era)|ja|慶応|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 2 (Gregorian {{ill|1866|ja|1866th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 24|ja|4月24日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Ishii Kikujirō|ja|石井菊次郎|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , Japanese {{ill|diplomat|ja|外交官|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1945|ja|1945th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Meiji (era)|ja|明治|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 4 (Gregorian {{ill|1871|ja|1871st year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 29|ja|4月29日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Yoshioka Yayoi|ja|吉岡弥生|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , physician and founder of {{ill|Tokyo Women's Medical University|ja|東京女子医科大学|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1959|ja|1959th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).

* {{ill|Kenkyū (era)|ja|建久|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 2 (Julian {{ill|1191|ja|1191st year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 5|ja|4月5日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Nagakata|ja|藤原長方|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , senior court official and author of *An'nagon Nagakata Collection* and *Zenchūki* (* {{ill|1139|ja|1139th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Tenbun (era)|ja|天文|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 15 (Julian {{ill|1544|ja|1544th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 10|ja|4月10日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Ryūzōji Iekane|ja|龍造寺家兼|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , feudal lord of {{ill|Kyushu|ja|九州|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1454|ja|1454th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).

* {{ill|Bunsei (era)|ja|文政|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1822|ja|1822nd year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|May 11|ja|5月11日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Kurikoma Jōun|ja|栗本鋤雲|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|bakufu|ja|幕臣|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} official and {{ill|journalist|ja|ジャーナリスト|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1897|ja|1897th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Kaei (era)|ja|嘉永|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 1 (Gregorian {{ill|1848|ja|1848th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 13|ja|4月13日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Asano Sōichirō|ja|浅野総一郎|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , entrepreneur and founder of the {{ill|Asano zaibatsu|ja|浅野財閥|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1930|ja|1930th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Keiō (era)|ja|慶応|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 2 (Gregorian {{ill|1866|ja|1866th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 24|ja|4月24日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Ishii Kikujirō|ja|石井菊次郎|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , Japanese {{ill|diplomat|ja|外交官|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1945|ja|1945th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Meiji (era)|ja|明治|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 4 (Gregorian {{ill|1871|ja|1871st year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 29|ja|4月29日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Yoshioka Yayoi|ja|吉岡弥生|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , physician and founder of {{ill|Tokyo Women's Medical University|ja|東京女子医科大学|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1959|ja|1959th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).

* {{ill|Enryaku (era)|ja|延暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 9 (Intercalary March) (Julian {{ill|790|ja|790th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 28|ja|4月28日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Otomuro|ja|藤原乙牟漏|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , Empress of {{ill|Emperor Kanmu|ja|桓武天皇|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|760|ja|760th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).

[[de:March 10 (Lunisolar)]] [[sn:March 10 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 10일]] [[ja:3月10日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:三月初十]] [[en:draft:March 10 (Lunisolar)]] [[ja:和銅3rd year の出来事]] [[sn:3月10日 (旧暦)]] [[en:3月10日 (旧暦)]] [[sn:arch 10 (Lunisolar)]] [[ar:March 10 (Lunisolar)]]
{{DEFAULTSORT:March 10 (Lunisolar)}}

{{Lunisolar March}} '''March 10''' is the 10th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Events ==
* {{ill|Emperor Monmu|ja|文武天皇|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 4 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|700|ja|700th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 3|ja|4月3日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – Buddhist monk {{ill|Dōshō|ja|道昭|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} is cremated, marking the first recorded cremation in Japan.
* {{ill|Wadō (era)|ja|和銅|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 3 (Julian {{ill|710|ja|710th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 13|ja|4月13日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Empress Genmei|ja|Emperor Genmei|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} relocates the capital from {{ill|Fujiwara-kyō|ja|藤原京|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} to {{ill|Heijō-kyō|ja|Heijō-kyō|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} .
* {{ill|Jōgan (Japan)|ja|貞観|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 8 (Intercalary March) (Julian {{ill|866|ja|866th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 28|ja|4月28日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Ōtenmon Incident|ja|応天門の変|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} : The {{ill|Ōtenmon Gate|ja|応天門|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} is set ablaze. {{ill|Ban no Yoshio|ja|伴善男|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , a descendant of the {{ill|Ōtomo clan|ja|大伴氏|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , is exiled as the arsonist, marking the decline of the clan’s political influence.
* {{ill|Eiwa (Japan)|ja|永和|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 4 / {{ill|Tenju (Japan)|ja|天授 (日本)|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 4 (Julian {{ill|1378|ja|1378th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 7|ja|4月7日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshimitsu|ja|足利義満|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} moves the {{ill|Muromachi shogunate|ja|Ashikaga Shogunate|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} to the newly constructed {{ill|Muromachi Palace|ja|室町殿|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (Hana no Gosho) in Kyoto.
* {{ill|Daoguang Emperor|ja|道光|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 19 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1839|ja|1839th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 23|ja|4月23日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – Qing officials arrive in {{ill|Guangdong|ja|広東|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} to enforce a crackdown on {{ill|opium|ja|阿片|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , leading to large-scale confiscation and destruction.
* {{ill|Meiji (era)|ja|明治|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 2 (Gregorian {{ill|1869|ja|1869th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 21|ja|4月21日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The {{ill|Tokyo City|ja|東京市|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} abolishes the {{ill|machinushi|ja|町名主|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} system, dismissing 238 town chiefs.
* Meiji 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1872|ja|1872nd year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 17|ja|4月17日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The {{ill|Ministry of Education (Japan)|ja|文部省|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} establishes a museum department (now the {{ill|Tokyo National Museum|ja|東京国立博物館|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) and hosts the first {{ill|exposition|ja|博覧会|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} at {{ill|Yushima Seidō|ja|湯島聖堂|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 's Taiseiden ({{ill|Yushima Seidō Exposition|ja|湯島聖堂博覧会|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Births ==

* {{ill|Bunsei (era)|ja|文政|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1822|ja|1822nd year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|May 11|ja|5月11日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Kurikoma Jōun|ja|栗本鋤雲|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|bakufu|ja|幕臣|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} official and {{ill|journalist|ja|ジャーナリスト|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1897|ja|1897th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Kaei (era)|ja|嘉永|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 1 (Gregorian {{ill|1848|ja|1848th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 13|ja|4月13日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Asano Sōichirō|ja|浅野総一郎|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , entrepreneur and founder of the {{ill|Asano zaibatsu|ja|浅野財閥|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1930|ja|1930th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Keiō (era)|ja|慶応|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 2 (Gregorian {{ill|1866|ja|1866th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 24|ja|4月24日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Ishii Kikujirō|ja|石井菊次郎|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , Japanese {{ill|diplomat|ja|外交官|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1945|ja|1945th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Meiji (era)|ja|明治|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 4 (Gregorian {{ill|1871|ja|1871st year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 29|ja|4月29日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Yoshioka Yayoi|ja|吉岡弥生|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , physician and founder of {{ill|Tokyo Women's Medical University|ja|東京女子医科大学|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1959|ja|1959th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).

{{DEFAULTSORT:March 10 (Lunisolar)}}

{{Lunisolar March}} '''March 10''' is the 10th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} .

[[de:March 10 (Lunisolar)]] [[sn:March 10 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 10일]] [[ja:3月10日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:三月初十]] [[en:draft:March 10 (Lunisolar)]] [[ja:和銅3rd year の出来事]] [[sn:3月10日 (旧暦)]] [[en:3月10日 (旧暦)]] [[sn:arch 10 (Lunisolar)]] [[ar:March 10 (Lunisolar)]]
{{DEFAULTSORT:March 10 (Lunisolar)}}

{{Lunisolar March}} '''March 10''' is the 10th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Events ==
* {{ill|Emperor Monmu|ja|文武天皇|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 4 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|700|ja|700th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 3|ja|4月3日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – Buddhist monk {{ill|Dōshō|ja|道昭|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} is cremated, marking the first recorded cremation in Japan.
* {{ill|Wadō (era)|ja|和銅|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 3 (Julian {{ill|710|ja|710th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 13|ja|4月13日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Empress Genmei|ja|Emperor Genmei|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} relocates the capital from {{ill|Fujiwara-kyō|ja|藤原京|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} to {{ill|Heijō-kyō|ja|Heijō-kyō|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} .
* {{ill|Jōgan (Japan)|ja|貞観|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 8 (Intercalary March) (Julian {{ill|866|ja|866th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 28|ja|4月28日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Ōtenmon Incident|ja|応天門の変|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} : The {{ill|Ōtenmon Gate|ja|応天門|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} is set ablaze. {{ill|Ban no Yoshio|ja|伴善男|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , a descendant of the {{ill|Ōtomo clan|ja|大伴氏|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , is exiled as the arsonist, marking the decline of the clan’s political influence.
* {{ill|Eiwa (Japan)|ja|永和|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 4 / {{ill|Tenju (Japan)|ja|天授 (日本)|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 4 (Julian {{ill|1378|ja|1378th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 7|ja|4月7日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshimitsu|ja|足利義満|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} moves the {{ill|Muromachi shogunate|ja|Ashikaga Shogunate|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} to the newly constructed {{ill|Muromachi Palace|ja|室町殿|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (Hana no Gosho) in Kyoto.
* {{ill|Daoguang Emperor|ja|道光|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 19 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1839|ja|1839th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 23|ja|4月23日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – Qing officials arrive in {{ill|Guangdong|ja|広東|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} to enforce a crackdown on {{ill|opium|ja|阿片|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , leading to large-scale confiscation and destruction.
* {{ill|Meiji (era)|ja|明治|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 2 (Gregorian {{ill|1869|ja|1869th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 21|ja|4月21日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The {{ill|Tokyo City|ja|東京市|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} abolishes the {{ill|machinushi|ja|町名主|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} system, dismissing 238 town chiefs.
* Meiji 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1872|ja|1872nd year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 17|ja|4月17日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The {{ill|Ministry of Education (Japan)|ja|文部省|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} establishes a museum department (now the {{ill|Tokyo National Museum|ja|東京国立博物館|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) and hosts the first {{ill|exposition|ja|博覧会|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} at {{ill|Yushima Seidō|ja|湯島聖堂|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 's Taiseiden ({{ill|Yushima Seidō Exposition|ja|湯島聖堂博覧会|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Births ==
* {{ill|Chōshō (era)|ja|長承|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 3 (Julian {{ill|1134|ja|1134th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 6|ja|4月6日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Yasuda Yoshisada|ja|安田義定|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , Japanese {{ill|samurai|ja|武将|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1194|ja|1194th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Tenbun (era)|ja|天文|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 5 (Julian {{ill|1536|ja|1536th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|March 31|ja|3月31日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshiteru|ja|足利義輝|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , 13th {{ill|Shogun|ja|征夷大将軍|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} of the {{ill|Muromachi shogunate|ja|Ashikaga Shogunate|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1565|ja|1565th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Bunsei (era)|ja|文政|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1822|ja|1822nd year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|May 11|ja|5月11日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Kurikoma Jōun|ja|栗本鋤雲|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|bakufu|ja|幕臣|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} official and {{ill|journalist|ja|ジャーナリスト|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1897|ja|1897th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Kaei (era)|ja|嘉永|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 1 (Gregorian {{ill|1848|ja|1848th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 13|ja|4月13日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Asano Sōichirō|ja|浅野総一郎|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , entrepreneur and founder of the {{ill|Asano zaibatsu|ja|浅野財閥|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1930|ja|1930th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Keiō (era)|ja|慶応|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 2 (Gregorian {{ill|1866|ja|1866th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 24|ja|4月24日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Ishii Kikujirō|ja|石井菊次郎|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , Japanese {{ill|diplomat|ja|外交官|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1945|ja|1945th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Meiji (era)|ja|明治|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 4 (Gregorian {{ill|1871|ja|1871st year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 29|ja|4月29日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Yoshioka Yayoi|ja|吉岡弥生|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , physician and founder of {{ill|Tokyo Women's Medical University|ja|東京女子医科大学|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1959|ja|1959th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Deaths ==
* Emperor Monmu 4 (Julian {{ill|700|ja|700th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 3|ja|4月3日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Dōshō|ja|道昭|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , Buddhist monk.
* {{ill|Enryaku (era)|ja|延暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 9 (Intercalary March) (Julian {{ill|790|ja|790th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 28|ja|4月28日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Otomuro|ja|藤原乙牟漏|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , Empress of {{ill|Emperor Kanmu|ja|桓武天皇|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|760|ja|760th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Kenkyū (era)|ja|建久|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 2 (Julian {{ill|1191|ja|1191st year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 5|ja|4月5日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Nagakata|ja|藤原長方|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , senior court official and author of *An'nagon Nagakata Collection* and *Zenchūki* (* {{ill|1139|ja|1139th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Tenbun (era)|ja|天文|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 15 (Julian {{ill|1544|ja|1544th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 10|ja|4月10日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Ryūzōji Iekane|ja|龍造寺家兼|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , feudal lord of {{ill|Kyushu|ja|九州|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1454|ja|1454th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Kan'ei (era)|ja|寛永|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 14 (Gregorian {{ill|1637|ja|1637th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 5|ja|4月5日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Honda Masazumi|ja|本多正純|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , early Edo-period {{ill|daimyō|ja|大名|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1565|ja|1565th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).

* {{ill|Kenkyū (era)|ja|建久|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 2 (Julian {{ill|1191|ja|1191st year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 5|ja|4月5日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Nagakata|ja|藤原長方|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , senior court official and author of *An'nagon Nagakata Collection* and *Zenchūki* (* {{ill|1139|ja|1139th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Tenbun (era)|ja|天文|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 15 (Julian {{ill|1544|ja|1544th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 10|ja|4月10日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Ryūzōji Iekane|ja|龍造寺家兼|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , feudal lord of {{ill|Kyushu|ja|九州|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1454|ja|1454th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).

[[de:March 10 (Lunisolar)]] [[sn:March 10 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 10일]] [[ja:3月10日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:三月初十]] [[en:draft:March 10 (Lunisolar)]] [[ja:和銅3rd year の出来事]] [[sn:3月10日 (旧暦)]] [[en:3月10日 (旧暦)]] [[sn:arch 10 (Lunisolar)]] [[ar:March 10 (Lunisolar)]]
{{DEFAULTSORT:March 10 (Lunisolar)}}

{{Lunisolar March}} '''March 10''' is the 10th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Events ==
* {{ill|Emperor Monmu|ja|文武天皇|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 4 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|700|ja|700th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 3|ja|4月3日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – Buddhist monk {{ill|Dōshō|ja|道昭|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} is cremated, marking the first recorded cremation in Japan.
* {{ill|Wadō (era)|ja|和銅|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 3 (Julian {{ill|710|ja|710th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 13|ja|4月13日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Empress Genmei|ja|Emperor Genmei|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} relocates the capital from {{ill|Fujiwara-kyō|ja|藤原京|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} to {{ill|Heijō-kyō|ja|Heijō-kyō|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} .
* {{ill|Jōgan (Japan)|ja|貞観|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 8 (Intercalary March) (Julian {{ill|866|ja|866th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 28|ja|4月28日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Ōtenmon Incident|ja|応天門の変|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} : The {{ill|Ōtenmon Gate|ja|応天門|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} is set ablaze. {{ill|Ban no Yoshio|ja|伴善男|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , a descendant of the {{ill|Ōtomo clan|ja|大伴氏|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , is exiled as the arsonist, marking the decline of the clan’s political influence.
* {{ill|Eiwa (Japan)|ja|永和|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 4 / {{ill|Tenju (Japan)|ja|天授 (日本)|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 4 (Julian {{ill|1378|ja|1378th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 7|ja|4月7日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshimitsu|ja|足利義満|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} moves the {{ill|Muromachi shogunate|ja|Ashikaga Shogunate|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} to the newly constructed {{ill|Muromachi Palace|ja|室町殿|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (Hana no Gosho) in Kyoto.
* {{ill|Daoguang Emperor|ja|道光|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 19 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1839|ja|1839th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 23|ja|4月23日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – Qing officials arrive in {{ill|Guangdong|ja|広東|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} to enforce a crackdown on {{ill|opium|ja|阿片|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , leading to large-scale confiscation and destruction.
* {{ill|Meiji (era)|ja|明治|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 2 (Gregorian {{ill|1869|ja|1869th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 21|ja|4月21日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The {{ill|Tokyo City|ja|東京市|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} abolishes the {{ill|machinushi|ja|町名主|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} system, dismissing 238 town chiefs.
* Meiji 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1872|ja|1872nd year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 17|ja|4月17日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The {{ill|Ministry of Education (Japan)|ja|文部省|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} establishes a museum department (now the {{ill|Tokyo National Museum|ja|東京国立博物館|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) and hosts the first {{ill|exposition|ja|博覧会|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} at {{ill|Yushima Seidō|ja|湯島聖堂|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 's Taiseiden ({{ill|Yushima Seidō Exposition|ja|湯島聖堂博覧会|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Births ==
* {{ill|Chōshō (era)|ja|長承|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 3 (Julian {{ill|1134|ja|1134th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 6|ja|4月6日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Yasuda Yoshisada|ja|安田義定|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , Japanese {{ill|samurai|ja|武将|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1194|ja|1194th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Tenbun (era)|ja|天文|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 5 (Julian {{ill|1536|ja|1536th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|March 31|ja|3月31日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshiteru|ja|足利義輝|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , 13th {{ill|Shogun|ja|征夷大将軍|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} of the {{ill|Muromachi shogunate|ja|Ashikaga Shogunate|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1565|ja|1565th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Bunsei (era)|ja|文政|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1822|ja|1822nd year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|May 11|ja|5月11日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Kurikoma Jōun|ja|栗本鋤雲|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|bakufu|ja|幕臣|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} official and {{ill|journalist|ja|ジャーナリスト|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1897|ja|1897th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Kaei (era)|ja|嘉永|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 1 (Gregorian {{ill|1848|ja|1848th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 13|ja|4月13日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Asano Sōichirō|ja|浅野総一郎|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , entrepreneur and founder of the {{ill|Asano zaibatsu|ja|浅野財閥|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1930|ja|1930th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Keiō (era)|ja|慶応|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 2 (Gregorian {{ill|1866|ja|1866th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 24|ja|4月24日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Ishii Kikujirō|ja|石井菊次郎|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , Japanese {{ill|diplomat|ja|外交官|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1945|ja|1945th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Meiji (era)|ja|明治|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 4 (Gregorian {{ill|1871|ja|1871st year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 29|ja|4月29日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Yoshioka Yayoi|ja|吉岡弥生|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , physician and founder of {{ill|Tokyo Women's Medical University|ja|東京女子医科大学|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1959|ja|1959th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).

* {{ill|Kenkyū (era)|ja|建久|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 2 (Julian {{ill|1191|ja|1191st year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 5|ja|4月5日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Nagakata|ja|藤原長方|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , senior court official and author of *An'nagon Nagakata Collection* and *Zenchūki* (* {{ill|1139|ja|1139th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Tenbun (era)|ja|天文|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 15 (Julian {{ill|1544|ja|1544th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 10|ja|4月10日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Ryūzōji Iekane|ja|龍造寺家兼|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , feudal lord of {{ill|Kyushu|ja|九州|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1454|ja|1454th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).

* {{ill|Bunsei (era)|ja|文政|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1822|ja|1822nd year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|May 11|ja|5月11日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Kurikoma Jōun|ja|栗本鋤雲|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|bakufu|ja|幕臣|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} official and {{ill|journalist|ja|ジャーナリスト|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1897|ja|1897th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Kaei (era)|ja|嘉永|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 1 (Gregorian {{ill|1848|ja|1848th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 13|ja|4月13日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Asano Sōichirō|ja|浅野総一郎|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , entrepreneur and founder of the {{ill|Asano zaibatsu|ja|浅野財閥|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1930|ja|1930th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Keiō (era)|ja|慶応|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 2 (Gregorian {{ill|1866|ja|1866th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 24|ja|4月24日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Ishii Kikujirō|ja|石井菊次郎|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , Japanese {{ill|diplomat|ja|外交官|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1945|ja|1945th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Meiji (era)|ja|明治|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 4 (Gregorian {{ill|1871|ja|1871st year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 29|ja|4月29日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Yoshioka Yayoi|ja|吉岡弥生|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , physician and founder of {{ill|Tokyo Women's Medical University|ja|東京女子医科大学|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1959|ja|1959th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Deaths ==
* Emperor Monmu 4 (Julian {{ill|700|ja|700th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 3|ja|4月3日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Dōshō|ja|道昭|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , Buddhist monk.
* {{ill|Enryaku (era)|ja|延暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 9 (Intercalary March) (Julian {{ill|790|ja|790th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 28|ja|4月28日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Otomuro|ja|藤原乙牟漏|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , Empress of {{ill|Emperor Kanmu|ja|桓武天皇|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|760|ja|760th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Kenkyū (era)|ja|建久|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 2 (Julian {{ill|1191|ja|1191st year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 5|ja|4月5日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Nagakata|ja|藤原長方|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , senior court official and author of *An'nagon Nagakata Collection* and *Zenchūki* (* {{ill|1139|ja|1139th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Tenbun (era)|ja|天文|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 15 (Julian {{ill|1544|ja|1544th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 10|ja|4月10日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Ryūzōji Iekane|ja|龍造寺家兼|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , feudal lord of {{ill|Kyushu|ja|九州|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1454|ja|1454th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Kan'ei (era)|ja|寛永|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 14 (Gregorian {{ill|1637|ja|1637th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 5|ja|4月5日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Honda Masazumi|ja|本多正純|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , early Edo-period {{ill|daimyō|ja|大名|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1565|ja|1565th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).

[[de:March 10 (Lunisolar)]] [[sn:March 10 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 10일]] [[ja:3月10日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:三月初十]] [[en:draft:March 10 (Lunisolar)]] [[ja:和銅3rd year の出来事]] [[sn:3月10日 (旧暦)]] [[en:3月10日 (旧暦)]] [[sn:arch 10 (Lunisolar)]] [[ar:March 10 (Lunisolar)]]
{{DEFAULTSORT:March 10 (Lunisolar)}}

{{Lunisolar March}} '''March 10''' is the 10th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Events ==
* {{ill|Emperor Monmu|ja|文武天皇|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 4 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|700|ja|700th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 3|ja|4月3日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – Buddhist monk {{ill|Dōshō|ja|道昭|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} is cremated, marking the first recorded cremation in Japan.
* {{ill|Wadō (era)|ja|和銅|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 3 (Julian {{ill|710|ja|710th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 13|ja|4月13日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Empress Genmei|ja|Emperor Genmei|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} relocates the capital from {{ill|Fujiwara-kyō|ja|藤原京|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} to {{ill|Heijō-kyō|ja|Heijō-kyō|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} .
* {{ill|Jōgan (Japan)|ja|貞観|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 8 (Intercalary March) (Julian {{ill|866|ja|866th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 28|ja|4月28日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Ōtenmon Incident|ja|応天門の変|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} : The {{ill|Ōtenmon Gate|ja|応天門|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} is set ablaze. {{ill|Ban no Yoshio|ja|伴善男|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , a descendant of the {{ill|Ōtomo clan|ja|大伴氏|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , is exiled as the arsonist, marking the decline of the clan’s political influence.
* {{ill|Eiwa (Japan)|ja|永和|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 4 / {{ill|Tenju (Japan)|ja|天授 (日本)|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 4 (Julian {{ill|1378|ja|1378th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 7|ja|4月7日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshimitsu|ja|足利義満|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} moves the {{ill|Muromachi shogunate|ja|Ashikaga Shogunate|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} to the newly constructed {{ill|Muromachi Palace|ja|室町殿|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (Hana no Gosho) in Kyoto.
* {{ill|Daoguang Emperor|ja|道光|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 19 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1839|ja|1839th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 23|ja|4月23日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – Qing officials arrive in {{ill|Guangdong|ja|広東|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} to enforce a crackdown on {{ill|opium|ja|阿片|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , leading to large-scale confiscation and destruction.
* {{ill|Meiji (era)|ja|明治|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 2 (Gregorian {{ill|1869|ja|1869th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 21|ja|4月21日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The {{ill|Tokyo City|ja|東京市|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} abolishes the {{ill|machinushi|ja|町名主|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} system, dismissing 238 town chiefs.
* Meiji 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1872|ja|1872nd year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 17|ja|4月17日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The {{ill|Ministry of Education (Japan)|ja|文部省|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} establishes a museum department (now the {{ill|Tokyo National Museum|ja|東京国立博物館|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) and hosts the first {{ill|exposition|ja|博覧会|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} at {{ill|Yushima Seidō|ja|湯島聖堂|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 's Taiseiden ({{ill|Yushima Seidō Exposition|ja|湯島聖堂博覧会|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Births ==
* {{ill|Chōshō (era)|ja|長承|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 3 (Julian {{ill|1134|ja|1134th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 6|ja|4月6日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Yasuda Yoshisada|ja|安田義定|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , Japanese {{ill|samurai|ja|武将|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1194|ja|1194th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Tenbun (era)|ja|天文|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 5 (Julian {{ill|1536|ja|1536th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|March 31|ja|3月31日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshiteru|ja|足利義輝|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , 13th {{ill|Shogun|ja|征夷大将軍|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} of the {{ill|Muromachi shogunate|ja|Ashikaga Shogunate|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1565|ja|1565th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Bunsei (era)|ja|文政|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1822|ja|1822nd year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|May 11|ja|5月11日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Kurikoma Jōun|ja|栗本鋤雲|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|bakufu|ja|幕臣|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} official and {{ill|journalist|ja|ジャーナリスト|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1897|ja|1897th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Kaei (era)|ja|嘉永|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 1 (Gregorian {{ill|1848|ja|1848th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 13|ja|4月13日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Asano Sōichirō|ja|浅野総一郎|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , entrepreneur and founder of the {{ill|Asano zaibatsu|ja|浅野財閥|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1930|ja|1930th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Keiō (era)|ja|慶応|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 2 (Gregorian {{ill|1866|ja|1866th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 24|ja|4月24日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Ishii Kikujirō|ja|石井菊次郎|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , Japanese {{ill|diplomat|ja|外交官|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1945|ja|1945th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Meiji (era)|ja|明治|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 4 (Gregorian {{ill|1871|ja|1871st year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 29|ja|4月29日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Yoshioka Yayoi|ja|吉岡弥生|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , physician and founder of {{ill|Tokyo Women's Medical University|ja|東京女子医科大学|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1959|ja|1959th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Deaths ==
* Emperor Monmu 4 (Julian {{ill|700|ja|700th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 3|ja|4月3日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Dōshō|ja|道昭|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , Buddhist monk.
* {{ill|Enryaku (era)|ja|延暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 9 (Intercalary March) (Julian {{ill|790|ja|790th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 28|ja|4月28日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Otomuro|ja|藤原乙牟漏|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , Empress of {{ill|Emperor Kanmu|ja|桓武天皇|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|760|ja|760th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Kenkyū (era)|ja|建久|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 2 (Julian {{ill|1191|ja|1191st year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 5|ja|4月5日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Nagakata|ja|藤原長方|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , senior court official and author of *An'nagon Nagakata Collection* and *Zenchūki* (* {{ill|1139|ja|1139th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} .

* {{ill|Emperor Monmu|ja|文武天皇|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 4 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|700|ja|700th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 3|ja|4月3日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – Buddhist monk {{ill|Dōshō|ja|道昭|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} is cremated, marking the first recorded cremation in Japan.
* {{ill|Wadō (era)|ja|和銅|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 3 (Julian {{ill|710|ja|710th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 13|ja|4月13日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Empress Genmei|ja|Emperor Genmei|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} relocates the capital from {{ill|Fujiwara-kyō|ja|藤原京|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} to {{ill|Heijō-kyō|ja|Heijō-kyō|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} .
* {{ill|Jōgan (Japan)|ja|貞観|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 8 (Intercalary March) (Julian {{ill|866|ja|866th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 28|ja|4月28日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Ōtenmon Incident|ja|応天門の変|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} : The {{ill|Ōtenmon Gate|ja|応天門|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} is set ablaze. {{ill|Ban no Yoshio|ja|伴善男|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , a descendant of the {{ill|Ōtomo clan|ja|大伴氏|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , is exiled as the arsonist, marking the decline of the clan’s political influence.
* {{ill|Eiwa (Japan)|ja|永和|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 4 / {{ill|Tenju (Japan)|ja|天授 (日本)|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 4 (Julian {{ill|1378|ja|1378th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 7|ja|4月7日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshimitsu|ja|足利義満|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} moves the {{ill|Muromachi shogunate|ja|Ashikaga Shogunate|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} to the newly constructed {{ill|Muromachi Palace|ja|室町殿|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (Hana no Gosho) in Kyoto.
* {{ill|Daoguang Emperor|ja|道光|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 19 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский календарь|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1839|ja|1839th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 23|ja|4月23日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – Qing officials arrive in {{ill|Guangdong|ja|広東|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} to enforce a crackdown on {{ill|opium|ja|阿片|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , leading to large-scale confiscation and destruction.
* {{ill|Meiji (era)|ja|明治|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 2 (Gregorian {{ill|1869|ja|1869th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 21|ja|4月21日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The {{ill|Tokyo City|ja|東京市|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} abolishes the {{ill|machinushi|ja|町名主|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} system, dismissing 238 town chiefs.
* Meiji 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1872|ja|1872nd year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 17|ja|4月17日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The {{ill|Ministry of Education (Japan)|ja|文部省|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} establishes a museum department (now the {{ill|Tokyo National Museum|ja|東京国立博物館|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) and hosts the first {{ill|exposition|ja|博覧会|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} at {{ill|Yushima Seidō|ja|湯島聖堂|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 's Taiseiden ({{ill|Yushima Seidō Exposition|ja|湯島聖堂博覧会|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Births ==
* {{ill|Chōshō (era)|ja|長承|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 3 (Julian {{ill|1134|ja|1134th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 6|ja|4月6日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Yasuda Yoshisada|ja|安田義定|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , Japanese {{ill|samurai|ja|武将|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1194|ja|1194th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Tenbun (era)|ja|天文|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 5 (Julian {{ill|1536|ja|1536th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|March 31|ja|3月31日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshiteru|ja|足利義輝|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , 13th {{ill|Shogun|ja|征夷大将軍|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} of the {{ill|Muromachi shogunate|ja|Ashikaga Shogunate|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1565|ja|1565th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Bunsei (era)|ja|文政|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1822|ja|1822nd year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|May 11|ja|5月11日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Kurikoma Jōun|ja|栗本鋤雲|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|bakufu|ja|幕臣|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} official and {{ill|journalist|ja|ジャーナリスト|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1897|ja|1897th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Kaei (era)|ja|嘉永|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 1 (Gregorian {{ill|1848|ja|1848th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 13|ja|4月13日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Asano Sōichirō|ja|浅野総一郎|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , entrepreneur and founder of the {{ill|Asano zaibatsu|ja|浅野財閥|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1930|ja|1930th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Keiō (era)|ja|慶応|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 2 (Gregorian {{ill|1866|ja|1866th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 24|ja|4月24日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Ishii Kikujirō|ja|石井菊次郎|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , Japanese {{ill|diplomat|ja|外交官|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1945|ja|1945th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Meiji (era)|ja|明治|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 4 (Gregorian {{ill|1871|ja|1871st year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 29|ja|4月29日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Yoshioka Yayoi|ja|吉岡弥生|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , physician and founder of {{ill|Tokyo Women's Medical University|ja|東京女子医科大学|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1959|ja|1959th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Deaths ==
* Emperor Monmu 4 (Julian {{ill|700|ja|700th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 3|ja|4月3日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Dōshō|ja|道昭|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , Buddhist monk.
* {{ill|Enryaku (era)|ja|延暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 9 (Intercalary March) (Julian {{ill|790|ja|790th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 28|ja|4月28日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Otomuro|ja|藤原乙牟漏|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , Empress of {{ill|Emperor Kanmu|ja|桓武天皇|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|760|ja|760th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Kenkyū (era)|ja|建久|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 2 (Julian {{ill|1191|ja|1191st year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 5|ja|4月5日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Nagakata|ja|藤原長方|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , senior court official and author of *An'nagon Nagakata Collection* and *Zenchūki* (* {{ill|1139|ja|1139th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Tenbun (era)|ja|天文|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 15 (Julian {{ill|1544|ja|1544th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 10|ja|4月10日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Ryūzōji Iekane|ja|龍造寺家兼|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , feudal lord of {{ill|Kyushu|ja|九州|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1454|ja|1454th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Kan'ei (era)|ja|寛永|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 14 (Gregorian {{ill|1637|ja|1637th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 5|ja|4月5日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Honda Masazumi|ja|本多正純|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , early Edo-period {{ill|daimyō|ja|大名|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1565|ja|1565th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
