* {{ill|Kaei|en|Kaei|qid=Q1146125|lt=Kaei (era)|1=Kaei}} 1 (Gregorian {{ill|1848|en|1848|qid=Q7647|lt=1848|1=1848}} {{ill|April 13|en|April 13|qid=Q2498|lt=April 13|1=April 13}} ) – {{ill|Asano Sōichirō|en|Asano Sōichirō|qid=Q4803533|lt=Asano Sōichirō|1=Asano Sōichirō}} , entrepreneur and founder of the {{ill|Asano zaibatsu|en|Asano zaibatsu|qid=Q4160702|lt=Asano zaibatsu|1=Asano zaibatsu}} (+ {{ill|1930|en|1930|qid=Q18787|lt=1930|1=1930}} ).
* {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|qid=Q776775|lt=Keiō (era)|1=Keiō}} 2 (Gregorian {{ill|1866|en|1866|qid=Q7712|lt=1866|1=1866}} {{ill|April 24|en|April 24|qid=Q2529|lt=April 24|1=April 24}} ) – {{ill|Ishii Kikujirō|en|Ishii Kikujirō|qid=Q129782|lt=Ishii Kikujirō|1=Ishii Kikujirō}} , Japanese {{ill|Diplomat|en|Diplomat|qid=Q193391|lt=diplomat|1=Diplomat}} (+ {{ill|1945|en|1945|qid=Q5240|lt=1945|1=1945}} ).
* {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 4 (Gregorian {{ill|1871|en|1871|qid=Q7746|lt=1871|1=1871}} {{ill|April 29|en|April 29|qid=Q2535|lt=April 29|1=April 29}} ) – {{ill|Yoshioka Yayoi|ja|吉岡弥生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yoshioka Yayoi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 吉岡彌生|1=Yoshioka Yayoi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q3138424}} , physician and founder of {{ill|Tokyo Women's Medical University|en|Tokyo Women's Medical University|qid=Q11524729|lt=Tokyo Women's Medical University|1=Tokyo Women's Medical University}} (+ {{ill|1959|en|1959|qid=Q5302|lt=1959|1=1959}} ).
== Deaths ==
* Emperor Monmu 4 (Julian {{ill|700|en|700|qid=Q23494|lt=700|1=700}} {{ill|April 3|en|April 3|qid=Q2509|lt=April 3|1=April 3}} ) – {{ill|Dōshō|en|Dōshō|qid=Q724005|lt=Dōshō|1=Dōshō}} , Buddhist monk.
* {{ill|Enryaku|en|Enryaku|qid=Q1373176|lt=Enryaku (era)|1=Enryaku}} 9 (Intercalary March) (Julian {{ill|790|en|790|qid=Q31147|lt=790|1=790}} {{ill|April 28|en|April 28|qid=Q2534|lt=April 28|1=April 28}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Otomuro|en|Fujiwara no Otomuro|qid=Q2110461|lt=Fujiwara no Otomuro|1=Fujiwara no Otomuro}} , Empress of {{ill|Emperor Kanmu|en|Emperor Kanmu|qid=Q314846|lt=Emperor Kanmu|1=Emperor Kanmu}} (* {{ill|760|en|760|qid=Q30552|lt=760|1=760}} ).
* {{ill|Kenkyū|en|Kenkyū|qid=Q1193933|lt=Kenkyū (era)|1=Kenkyū}} 2 (Julian {{ill|1191|en|1191|qid=Q19738|lt=1191|1=1191}} {{ill|April 5|en|April 5|qid=Q2507|lt=April 5|1=April 5}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Nagakata|ja|藤原長方|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara no Nagakata|1=Nagakata Fujiwara|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11623620}} , senior court official and author of *An'nagon Nagakata Collection* and *Zenchūki* (* {{ill|1139|en|1139|qid=Q19608|lt=1139|1=1139}} ).
* {{ill|Tenbun (era)|ja|天文|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenbun (era)|1=Tenmon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q21096812}} 15 (Julian {{ill|1544|en|1544|qid=Q6525|lt=1544|1=1544}} {{ill|April 10|en|April 10|qid=Q2502|lt=April 10|1=April 10}} ) – {{ill|Ryūzōji Iekane|ja|龍造寺家兼|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ryūzōji Iekane|1=Q5368164|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q5368164}} , feudal lord of {{ill|Kyushu|en|Kyushu|qid=Q13987|lt=Kyushu|1=Kyushu}} (* {{ill|1454|en|1454|qid=Q6476|lt=1454|1=1454}} ).
* {{ill|Kan'ei|en|Kan'ei|qid=Q1192913|lt=Kan'ei (era)|1=Kan'ei}} 14 (Gregorian {{ill|1637|en|1637|qid=Q6889|lt=1637|1=1637}} {{ill|April 5|en|April 5|qid=Q2507|lt=April 5|1=April 5}} ) – {{ill|Honda Masazumi|en|Honda Masazumi|qid=Q1058809|lt=Honda Masazumi|1=Honda Masazumi}} , early Edo-period {{ill|Daimyo|en|Daimyo|qid=Q61982|lt=daimyō|1=Daimyo}} (* {{ill|1565|en|1565|qid=Q6634|lt=1565|1=1565}} ).
== Commemorations ==

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments; consolidate 31 interlanguage link(s) into wikidata link template (has duplicate-language pairs) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/25113759987|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Not to be confused with|March 10|qq=March 10}}
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月初十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 10일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 10''' is the 10th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11635368}} .
== Events ==
* {{ill|Emperor Monmu|en|Emperor Monmu|qid=Q357246|lt=Emperor Monmu|1=Emperor Monmu}} 4 ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|700|en|700|qid=Q23494|lt=700|1=700}} {{ill|April 3|en|April 3|qid=Q2509|lt=April 3|1=April 3}} ) – Buddhist monk {{ill|Dōshō|en|Dōshō|qid=Q724005|lt=Dōshō|1=Dōshō}} is cremated, marking the first recorded cremation in Japan.
* {{ill|Wadō (era)|en|Wadō (era)|qid=Q1373026|lt=Wadō (era)|1=Wadō (era)}} 3 (Julian {{ill|710|en|710|qid=Q23518|lt=710|1=710}} {{ill|April 13|en|April 13|qid=Q2498|lt=April 13|1=April 13}} ) – {{ill|Empress Genmei|ja|Emperor Genmei|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Genmei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} relocates the capital from {{ill|Fujiwara-kyō|en|Fujiwara-kyō|qid=Q1196381|lt=Fujiwara-kyō|1=Fujiwara-kyō}} to {{ill|Heijō-kyō|ja|Heijō-kyō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Heijō-kyō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} .
* {{ill|Zhenguan|en|Zhenguan|qid=Q3577278|lt=Jōgan (Japan)|1=Zhenguan}} 8 (Intercalary March) (Julian {{ill|866|en|866|qid=Q23872|lt=866|1=866}} {{ill|April 28|en|April 28|qid=Q2534|lt=April 28|1=April 28}} ) – {{ill|Ōtenmon Incident|en|Ōtenmon Incident|qid=Q169232|lt=Ōtenmon Incident|1=Ōtenmon Incident}} : The {{ill|Yingtian Gate|en|Yingtian Gate|qid=Q11491257|lt=Ōtenmon Gate|1=Yingtian Gate}} is set ablaze. {{ill|Tomo no Yoshio|en|Tomo no Yoshio|qid=Q7820079|lt=Ban no Yoshio|1=Tomo no Yoshio}} , a descendant of the {{ill|Ōtomo clan (ancient)|en|Ōtomo clan (ancient)|qid=Q17227938|lt=Ōtomo clan|1=Ōtomo clan (ancient)}} , is exiled as the arsonist, marking the decline of the clan’s political influence.
* {{ill|Eiwa (Japan)|ja|永和|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eiwa (Japan)|1=Eiwa|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11131293}} 4 / {{ill|Tenju|en|Tenju|qid=Q1145023|lt=Tenju (Japan)|1=Tenju}} 4 (Julian {{ill|1378|en|1378|qid=Q6306|lt=1378|1=1378}} {{ill|April 7|en|April 7|qid=Q2505|lt=April 7|1=April 7}} ) – {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshimitsu|en|Ashikaga Yoshimitsu|qid=Q248381|lt=Ashikaga Yoshimitsu|1=Ashikaga Yoshimitsu}} moves the {{ill|Muromachi shogunate|ja|Ashikaga Shogunate|1=Ashikaga shogunate|2=ja|3=室町幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Muromachi shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1154406}} to the newly constructed {{ill|Muromachi Palace|ja|室町殿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Muromachi Palace|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 足利将軍家|1=Ashikaga shogun family|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q28692536}} (Hana no Gosho) in Kyoto.
* {{ill|Daoguang Emperor|ja|道光|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daoguang Emperor|1=Daoguang Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1133186}} 19 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1839|en|1839|qid=Q7616|lt=1839|1=1839}} {{ill|April 23|en|April 23|qid=Q2527|lt=April 23|1=April 23}} ) – Qing officials arrive in {{ill|Guangdong|ja|広東|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guangdong|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 広東省|1=Guangdong|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q15175}} to enforce a crackdown on {{ill|opium|ja|阿片|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/opium|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to アヘン|1=Opium|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q46452}} , leading to large-scale confiscation and destruction.
* {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 2 (Gregorian {{ill|1869|en|1869|qid=Q7720|lt=1869|1=1869}} {{ill|April 21|en|April 21|qid=Q2525|lt=April 21|1=April 21}} ) – The {{ill|Tokyo City|en|Tokyo City|qid=Q1207735|lt=Tokyo City|1=Tokyo City}} abolishes the {{ill|machinushi|ja|町名主|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/machinushi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 庄屋|1=Nanushi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q110095960}} system, dismissing 238 town chiefs.
* Meiji 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1872|en|1872|qid=Q7753|lt=1872|1=1872}} {{ill|April 17|en|April 17|qid=Q2520|lt=April 17|1=April 17}} ) – The {{ill|Ministry of Education, Science, Sports and Culture|en|Ministry of Education, Science, Sports and Culture|qid=Q11080185|lt=Ministry of Education (Japan)|1=Ministry of Education, Science, Sports and Culture}} establishes a museum department (now the {{ill|Tokyo National Museum|en|Tokyo National Museum|qid=Q653433|lt=Tokyo National Museum|1=Tokyo National Museum}} ) and hosts the first {{ill|exposition|ja|博覧会|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/exposition|1=hakurankai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q112298281}} at {{ill|Yushima Seidō|en|Yushima Seidō|qid=Q1760591|lt=Yushima Seidō|1=Yushima Seidō}} 's Taiseiden ({{ill|Yushima Seidō Exposition|en|Yushima Seidō Exposition|qid=Q107150759|lt=Yushima Seidō Exposition|1=Yushima Seidō Exposition}} ).
== Births ==
* {{ill|Chōshō|en|Chōshō|qid=Q1194264|lt=Chōshō (era)|1=Chōshō}} 3 (Julian {{ill|1134|en|1134|qid=Q19590|lt=1134|1=1134}} {{ill|April 6|en|April 6|qid=Q2506|lt=April 6|1=April 6}} ) – {{ill|Yasuda Yoshisada|en|Yasuda Yoshisada|qid=Q11451109|lt=Yasuda Yoshisada|1=Yasuda Yoshisada}} , Japanese {{ill|samurai|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/samurai|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11545923}} (+ {{ill|1194|en|1194|qid=Q19743|lt=1194|1=1194}} ).
* {{ill|Tenbun (era)|ja|天文|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenbun (era)|1=Tenmon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q21096812}} 5 (Julian {{ill|1536|en|1536|qid=Q6457|lt=1536|1=1536}} {{ill|March 31|en|March 31|qid=Q2461|lt=March 31|1=March 31}} ) – {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshiteru|en|Ashikaga Yoshiteru|qid=Q447066|lt=Ashikaga Yoshiteru|1=Ashikaga Yoshiteru}} , 13th {{ill|Shogun|en|Shogun|qid=Q131767|lt=Shogun|1=Shogun}} of the {{ill|Muromachi shogunate|ja|Ashikaga Shogunate|1=Ashikaga shogunate|2=ja|3=室町幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Muromachi shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1154406}} (+ {{ill|1565|en|1565|qid=Q6634|lt=1565|1=1565}} ).
* {{ill|Bunsei|en|Bunsei|qid=Q1327119|lt=Bunsei (era)|1=Bunsei}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1822|en|1822|qid=Q6983|lt=1822|1=1822}} {{ill|May 11|en|May 11|qid=Q2558|lt=May 11|1=May 11}} ) – {{ill|Kurimoto Jō'un|en|Kurimoto Jō'un|qid=Q6526509|lt=Kurikoma Jōun|1=Kurimoto Jō'un}} , {{ill|bakufu|ja|幕臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/bakufu|1=bakushin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11481849}} official and {{ill|Journalist|en|Journalist|qid=Q1930187|lt=journalist|1=Journalist}} (+ {{ill|1897|en|1897|qid=Q7847|lt=1897|1=1897}} ).
* {{ill|Kaei|en|Kaei|qid=Q1146125|lt=Kaei (era)|1=Kaei}} 1 (Gregorian {{ill|1848|en|1848|qid=Q7647|lt=1848|1=1848}} {{ill|April 13|en|April 13|qid=Q2498|lt=April 13|1=April 13}} ) – {{ill|Asano Sōichirō|en|Asano Sōichirō|qid=Q4803533|lt=Asano Sōichirō|1=Asano Sōichirō}} , entrepreneur and founder of the {{ill|Asano zaibatsu|en|Asano zaibatsu|qid=Q4160702|lt=Asano zaibatsu|1=Asano zaibatsu}} (+ {{ill|1930|en|1930|qid=Q18787|lt=1930|1=1930}} ).
* {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|qid=Q776775|lt=Keiō (era)|1=Keiō}} 2 (Gregorian {{ill|1866|en|1866|qid=Q7712|lt=1866|1=1866}} {{ill|April 24|en|April 24|qid=Q2529|lt=April 24|1=April 24}} ) – {{ill|Ishii Kikujirō|en|Ishii Kikujirō|qid=Q129782|lt=Ishii Kikujirō|1=Ishii Kikujirō}} , Japanese {{ill|Diplomat|en|Diplomat|qid=Q193391|lt=diplomat|1=Diplomat}} (+ {{ill|1945|en|1945|qid=Q5240|lt=1945|1=1945}} ).
* {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 4 (Gregorian {{ill|1871|en|1871|qid=Q7746|lt=1871|1=1871}} {{ill|April 29|en|April 29|qid=Q2535|lt=April 29|1=April 29}} ) – {{ill|Yoshioka Yayoi|ja|吉岡弥生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yoshioka Yayoi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 吉岡彌生|1=Yoshioka Yayoi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q3138424}} , physician and founder of {{ill|Tokyo Women's Medical University|en|Tokyo Women's Medical University|qid=Q11524729|lt=Tokyo Women's Medical University|1=Tokyo Women's Medical University}} (+ {{ill|1959|en|1959|qid=Q5302|lt=1959|1=1959}} ).
== Deaths ==
* Emperor Monmu 4 (Julian {{ill|700|en|700|qid=Q23494|lt=700|1=700}} {{ill|April 3|en|April 3|qid=Q2509|lt=April 3|1=April 3}} ) – {{ill|Dōshō|en|Dōshō|qid=Q724005|lt=Dōshō|1=Dōshō}} , Buddhist monk.
* {{ill|Enryaku|en|Enryaku|qid=Q1373176|lt=Enryaku (era)|1=Enryaku}} 9 (Intercalary March) (Julian {{ill|790|en|790|qid=Q31147|lt=790|1=790}} {{ill|April 28|en|April 28|qid=Q2534|lt=April 28|1=April 28}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Otomuro|en|Fujiwara no Otomuro|qid=Q2110461|lt=Fujiwara no Otomuro|1=Fujiwara no Otomuro}} , Empress of {{ill|Emperor Kanmu|en|Emperor Kanmu|qid=Q314846|lt=Emperor Kanmu|1=Emperor Kanmu}} (* {{ill|760|en|760|qid=Q30552|lt=760|1=760}} ).
* {{ill|Kenkyū|en|Kenkyū|qid=Q1193933|lt=Kenkyū (era)|1=Kenkyū}} 2 (Julian {{ill|1191|en|1191|qid=Q19738|lt=1191|1=1191}} {{ill|April 5|en|April 5|qid=Q2507|lt=April 5|1=April 5}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Nagakata|ja|藤原長方|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara no Nagakata|1=Nagakata Fujiwara|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11623620}} , senior court official and author of *An'nagon Nagakata Collection* and *Zenchūki* (* {{ill|1139|en|1139|qid=Q19608|lt=1139|1=1139}} ).
* {{ill|Tenbun (era)|ja|天文|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenbun (era)|1=Tenmon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q21096812}} 15 (Julian {{ill|1544|en|1544|qid=Q6525|lt=1544|1=1544}} {{ill|April 10|en|April 10|qid=Q2502|lt=April 10|1=April 10}} ) – {{ill|Ryūzōji Iekane|ja|龍造寺家兼|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ryūzōji Iekane|1=Q5368164|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q5368164}} , feudal lord of {{ill|Kyushu|en|Kyushu|qid=Q13987|lt=Kyushu|1=Kyushu}} (* {{ill|1454|en|1454|qid=Q6476|lt=1454|1=1454}} ).
* {{ill|Kan'ei|en|Kan'ei|qid=Q1192913|lt=Kan'ei (era)|1=Kan'ei}} 14 (Gregorian {{ill|1637|en|1637|qid=Q6889|lt=1637|1=1637}} {{ill|April 5|en|April 5|qid=Q2507|lt=April 5|1=April 5}} ) – {{ill|Honda Masazumi|en|Honda Masazumi|qid=Q1058809|lt=Honda Masazumi|1=Honda Masazumi}} , early Edo-period {{ill|Daimyo|en|Daimyo|qid=Q61982|lt=daimyō|1=Daimyo}} (* {{ill|1565|en|1565|qid=Q6634|lt=1565|1=1565}} ).
== Commemorations ==
